mapper.insert: /* wms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIcunit */ INSERT INTO TWORK_MST_ICUT ( CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUTKEY /*상품 단위 코드*/ , CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUTKEY /*상품 단위 코드*/ , #{closdate} AS CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT CT.CTKEY , T.OWKEY , T.ICKEY AS ICUTKEY , CASE WHEN IU.ICUTKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM ( SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , I.ICKEY FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT I WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} GROUP BY I.ICKEY ) T JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON T.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND T.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICGRXCT CT ON IC.OWKEY = CT.OWKEY AND IC.ICGRPKEY = CT.ICGRPKEY AND CT.ICGRPTYPE = 'CATEGORY' LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT IU ON T.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND T.ICKEY = IU.ICUTKEY AND CT.CTKEY = IU.CTKEY ) TT WHERE SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* wms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateIctxtype */ UPDATE TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE M SET ( ICUTORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , ICUTQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , LENGTH /*길이*/ , WIDTH /*너비*/ , HEIGHT /*높이*/ , SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , VOLUME /*부피*/ , VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) = ( SELECT U.ICUNITORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , U.ICUNITQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , U.LENGTH /*길이*/ , U.WIDTH /*너비*/ , U.HEIGHT /*높이*/ , U.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , U.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , U.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , U.VOL /*부피*/ , U.VOLUNIT /*부피단위*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE U JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT CT ON U.OWKEY = CT.OWKEY AND U.ICUNITKEY = CT.ICUNITKEY AND U.ICUNITTYPE = CT.ICUNITTYPE WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT I WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND U.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND I.ICKEY = U.ICUNITKEY ) AND U.MEASUREMENT_YN ='N' AND U.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND U.ICUNITKEY = M.ICUTKEY AND U.ICUNITTYPE = M.ICUTTYPE AND CT.CTKEY = M.CTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE U JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT CT ON U.OWKEY = CT.OWKEY AND U.ICUNITKEY = CT.ICUNITKEY AND U.ICUNITTYPE = CT.ICUNITTYPE WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT I WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND U.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND I.ICKEY = U.ICUTKEY ) AND U.MEASUREMENT_YN ='N' AND U.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND U.ICUNITKEY = M.ICUTKEY AND U.ICUNITTYPE = M.ICUTTYPE AND CT.CTKEY = M.CTKEY )
mapper.insert: /* wms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIctxtype */ INSERT INTO TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ( CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUTKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , ICUTTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , ICUTORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , ICUTQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , LENGTH /*길이*/ , WIDTH /*너비*/ , HEIGHT /*높이*/ , SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , VOLUME /*부피*/ , VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , INBOUNDUSEYN /*입고사용여부*/ , OUTBOUNDUSEYN /*출고사용여부*/ , IVUSEYN /*재고사용여부*/ , RETURNUSEYN /*반품사용여부*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT TT.CTKEY , TT.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , TT.ICUNITKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , TT.ICUNITTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , TT.ICUNITORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , TT.ICUNITQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , TT.LENGTH /*길이*/ , TT.WIDTH /*너비*/ , TT.HEIGHT /*높이*/ , TT.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , TT.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , TT.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , TT.VOL /*부피*/ , TT.VOLUNIT /*부피단위*/ , CASE WHEN TT.ICUTTYPE='BOX' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS INBOUNDUSEYN /*입고사용여부*/ , CASE WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='BOX' THEN 'Y' WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='BOL' AND TT.BAKERYYN='N' THEN 'Y' WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='EA' AND TT.BAKERYYN='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OUTBOUNDUSEYN /*출고사용여부*/ , CASE WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='BOX' THEN 'Y' WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='BOL' AND TT.BAKERYYN='N' THEN 'Y' WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='EA' AND TT.BAKERYYN='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IVUSEYN /*재고사용여부*/ , CASE WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='BOX' THEN 'Y' WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='BOL' AND TT.BAKERYYN='N' THEN 'Y' WHEN TT.ICUNITTYPE='EA' AND TT.BAKERYYN='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RETURNUSEYN /*반품사용여부*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT CT.CTKEY , T.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , T.ICUNITKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , T.ICUNITTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , T.ICUNITORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , T.ICUNITQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , T.LENGTH /*길이*/ , T.WIDTH /*너비*/ , T.HEIGHT /*높이*/ , T.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , T.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , T.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , T.VOL /*부피*/ , T.VOLUNIT /*부피단위*/ , CASE WHEN IC.ICGRPKEY='P0030' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BAKERYYN , CASE WHEN M.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE T ON IU.ICKEY = T.ICUNITKEY AND IU.UOM = T.ICUNITTYPE AND T.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON T.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND IU.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT CT ON T.OWKEY = CT.OWKEY AND T.ICUNITKEY = CT.ICUNITKEY AND T.ICUNITTYPE = CT.ICUNITTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE M ON T.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND T.ICUNITKEY = M.ICUTKEY AND T.ICUNITTYPE = M.ICUTTYPE AND CT.CTKEY = M.CTKEY WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* wms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateIcxct */ UPDATE TWORK_MST_IC UC SET ( UC.ICNAME /*물품명*/ , UC.ICGRKEY /*카테고리*/ , UC.ICGRTYPE /*물품그룹유형*/ , UC.ICUTKEY /*물품단위코드*/ , UC.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , UC.SPEC /*규격*/ , UC.WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , UC.LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , UC.HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , UC.VOLUME /*부피*/ , UC.WEIGHT /*무게*/ , UC.SHELFLIFEINDICATOR /*유통기한체크여부*/ , UC.SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , UC.UDF2 /*사용자정의필드2*/ , UC.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , UC.ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , UC.WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , UC.LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , UC.HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , UC.BOL_WIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , UC.BOL_LENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , UC.BOL_HEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , UC.BOL_WEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , UC.BOL_VOLUME /*BOL 부피*/ , UC.LOGGRPCD , UC.UPDATEDATE , UC.UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT M.ICNM /*물품명*/ , M.ICGRPKEY /*카테고리*/ , M.ICGRPTYPE /*물품그룹유형*/ , M.ICUNITKEY /*물품단위코드*/ , M.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , M.SPEC /*규격*/ , M.WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , M.LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , M.HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , M.VOL /*부피*/ , M.WEIGHT /*무게*/ , M.EXPCKYN /*유통기한체크여부*/ , M.SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , M.UDF2 /*사용자정의필드2*/ , M.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , M.ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , M.WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , M.LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , M.HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , M.BOLWIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , M.BOLLENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , M.BOLHEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , M.BOLWEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , M.BOLVOL /*BOL 부피*/ , IC.LOGGRPCD , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC M ON I.ICKEY = M.ICKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT IC ON M.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND M.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IC.ICKEY = UC.ICKEY AND IC.CTKEY = UC.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = UC.OWKEY ) WHERE UC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC T1 JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT T2 ON T1.ICKEY = T2.ICKEY AND T2.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE T1.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND T1.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND T2.ICKEY = UC.ICKEY AND T2.CTKEY = UC.CTKEY AND T2.OWKEY = UC.OWKEY )
mapper.insert: /* wms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIcxct */ INSERT INTO TWORK_MST_IC ( CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICKEY /*상품 코드*/ , ICNAME /*상품명*/ , ICGRKEY /*물품 그룹 코드*/ , ICGRTYPE /*물품 그룹 유형*/ , ICUTKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , VOLUME /*부피*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , BRANDCODE /*브랜드 코드*/ , ICST_HDKEY /*물품 전략 공통 코드*/ , TO_LCKEY /*TO 로케이션 코드*/ , TO_ARKEY /*TO 구역 코드*/ , ABC /*ABC 등급*/ , SAFE_INVQTY /*안전 재고 수량*/ , SHELFLIFEINDICATOR /*유통 기한 체크 여부*/ , SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , SHELFLIFECODETYPE /*유통 기한 체크 유형*/ , UDF1 /*사용자 정의 필드 1*/ , UDF2 /*사용자 정의 필드 2*/ , UDF3 /*사용자 정의 필드 3*/ , UDF4 /*사용자 정의 필드 4*/ , UDF5 /*사용자 정의 필드 5*/ , CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ , SERIALINPUTTYPE /*시리얼 입력 유형*/ , ACKEY /*거래처 코드*/ , PO_LEADTIME /*발주 리드 타임*/ , LOGGRPCD /*물류그룹코드(상/저온 구분)*/ , NEWYN /**/ , NONIBREASON /**/ , ORDSTOPTYPE /**/ , ORDTYPE /**/ , TAXYN /*과세구분*/ , UNIT_HEIGHT /**/ , UNIT_LENGTH /**/ , UNIT_WIDTH /**/ , USD_COSTPRICE /**/ , USD_SALEPRICE /**/ , VOLTYPE /*상품(용적) 구분*/ , ACCSTOCKDATE /*체화재고운영구분*/ , ACCSTOCKTYPE /*체화재고운영일자*/ , BOTTLEPRICE /*병금액*/ , BOXPRICE /*박스금액*/ , CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , DELYN /*삭제구분*/ , DISPSHELFKEY /*집기코드대분류(상온)*/ , ICTYPE /*상품구분*/ , LO_NON_STOCK_TYPE /*물류무재고운영구분*/ , MAXORDQTY /*발주배수상한*/ , MINORDQTY /*발주배수하한*/ , ORDSTOPDATE /*변경시작일*/ , REGDATE /*반영일자*/ , RELEASEDAYS /*출고기준일*/ , RETURNOR /*점포반품구분*/ , RFIDBOTTLE /*RFID_병*/ , RFIDBOX /*RFID_박스*/ , SPEC /*규격*/ , ORDSTARTDATE /*상품도입(첫발주)일자*/ , FOODYN /*식품/비식품여부*/ , CHITTYPE /*전표생성구분*/ , OBPTKEY /*출고패턴*/ , PLTMAXRT /*MAX율 필드추가*/ , PLTGRRT /*허용율 필드 추가*/ , PLTAPLYYN /*패널티 적용여부*/ , STC_APPLY_GRADE_CD /*재고등급코드*/ , COSTPRICE /*원가*/ , SALEPRICE /*매가*/ , OPERSTATYPE /*운영상태*/ , BOXYN /*공박스유무*/ , BOXICKEY /*공박스상품코드*/ , BTLYN /*공병유무*/ , BTLICKEY /*공병상품코드*/ , SHELFDAY /*보관수명(DAY)*/ , WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , MAXOVERQTY /*오발주 체크 수량(배수)*/ , CDOCKYN /*C-dock여부*/ , PKCTKEY /*피킹센터코드*/ , PKTYPE /*피킹형태*/ , CDCYN /**/ , IMGURL /*상품 이미지 URL*/ , OPTKEY /**/ , OPTNM /**/ , NOPACKAGE /**/ , COUNTRYCD /**/ , QC_TYPE /**/ , PLTQTY /*팔렛 입수 수량*/ , BRANDKEY /**/ , WGT_CF_YN /*검근여부*/ , WRHOUS_SE /*창고구분*/ , VALIDSTARTDATE /*상품코드유효시작일자*/ , VALIDENDDATE /*상품코드유효종료일자*/ , FREQUENCY /*빈도*/ , MSCSTORETYPE /*멀티셔틀보관방법*/ , BOL_WIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , BOL_LENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , BOL_HEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , BOL_WEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , BOL_VOLUME /*BOL 부피*/ ) SELECT ICT.CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , M.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , M.ICKEY /*상품 코드*/ , M.ICNM /*상품명*/ , M.ICGRPKEY /*물품 그룹 코드*/ , M.ICGRPTYPE /*물품 그룹 유형*/ , M.ICUNITKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , M.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , M.WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , M.LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , M.HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , M.VOL /*부피*/ , M.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , M.BRANDCD /*브랜드 코드*/ , NULL AS ICST_HDKEY /*물품 전략 공통 코드*/ , NULL AS TO_LCKEY /*TO 로케이션 코드*/ , NULL AS TO_ARKEY /*TO 구역 코드*/ , NULL AS ABC /*ABC 등급*/ , NULL AS SAFE_INVQTY /*안전 재고 수량*/ , M.EXPCKYN /*유통 기한 체크 여부*/ , M.SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , M.EXPCKTYPE /*유통 기한 체크 유형*/ , M.UDF1 /*사용자 정의 필드 1*/ , M.UDF2 /*사용자 정의 필드 2*/ , M.UDF3 /*사용자 정의 필드 3*/ , M.UDF4 /*사용자 정의 필드 4*/ , M.UDF5 /*사용자 정의 필드 5*/ , M.CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , M.SERIALINPUTTYPE /*시리얼 입력 유형*/ , M.ACKEY /*거래처 코드*/ , NULL AS PO_LEADTIME /*발주 리드 타임*/ , M.UDF2 AS LOGGRPCD /*물류그룹코드(상/저온 구분)*/ , 'Y' AS NEWYN /**/ , NULL AS NONIBREASON /**/ , NULL AS ORDSTOPTYPE /**/ , '0' AS ORDTYPE /**/ , M.TAXYN /*과세구분*/ , NULL AS UNIT_HEIGHT /**/ , NULL AS UNIT_LENGTH /**/ , NULL AS UNIT_WIDTH /**/ , NULL AS USD_COSTPRICE /**/ , NULL AS USD_SALEPRICE /**/ , '0' AS VOLTYPE /*상품(용적) 구분*/ , M.STGNIVDATE /*체화재고운영구분*/ , M.STGNIVTYPE /*체화재고운영일자*/ , M.BOTTLEPRICE /*병금액*/ , M.BOXPRICE /*박스금액*/ , M.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , M.DELYN /*삭제구분*/ , M.DISPSHELFKEY /*집기코드대분류(상온)*/ , M.ICTYPE /*상품구분*/ , M.LONONSTOCKTYPE /*물류무재고운영구분*/ , M.MAXORDQTY /*발주배수상한*/ , M.MINORDQTY /*발주배수하한*/ , M.ORDSTOPDATE /*변경시작일*/ , M.REGDATE /*반영일자*/ , M.OBDAYS /*출고기준일*/ , M.RETURNOR /*점포반품구분*/ , M.RFIDBOTTLE /*RFID_병*/ , M.RFIDBOX /*RFID_박스*/ , M.SPEC /*규격*/ , M.ORDSTARTDATE /*상품도입(첫발주)일자*/ , M.FOODYN /*식품/비식품여부*/ , M.CHITTYPE /*전표생성구분*/ , NULL AS OBPTKEY /*출고패턴*/ , NULL AS PLTMAXRT /*MAX율 필드추가*/ , NULL AS PLTGRRT /*허용율 필드 추가*/ , NULL AS PLTAPLYYN /*패널티 적용여부*/ , M.STCAPPLYGRADECD /*재고등급코드*/ , NULL AS COSTPRICE /*원가*/ , NULL AS SALEPRICE /*매가*/ , M.OPERSTATUSTYPE /*운영상태*/ , M.BOXYN /*공박스유무*/ , M.BOXICKEY /*공박스상품코드*/ , M.BTLYN /*공병유무*/ , M.BTLICKEY /*공병상품코드*/ , M.SHELFDAY /*보관수명(DAY)*/ , M.WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , M.LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , M.HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , NULL AS MAXOVERQTY /*오발주 체크 수량(배수)*/ , NULL AS CDOCKYN /*C-dock여부*/ , NULL AS PKCTKEY /*피킹센터코드*/ , NULL AS PKTYPE /*피킹형태*/ , NULL AS CDCYN /**/ , M.IMGURL /*상품 이미지 URL*/ , M.OPTKEY /**/ , M.OPTNM /**/ , M.NOPACKAGE /**/ , M.CNTRYCD /**/ , M.QCTYPE /**/ , M.PLTQTY /*팔렛 입수 수량*/ , M.BRANDKEY /**/ , M.WGTCFYN /*검근여부*/ , NULL AS WRHOUS_SE /*창고구분*/ , NULL AS VALIDSTARTDATE /*상품코드유효시작일자*/ , NULL AS VALIDENDDATE /*상품코드유효종료일자*/ , NULL AS FREQUENCY /*빈도*/ , NULL AS MSCSTORETYPE /*멀티셔틀보관방법*/ , M.BOLWIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , M.BOLLENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , M.BOLHEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , M.BOLWEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , M.BOLVOL /*BOL 부피*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC M ON I.ICKEY = M.ICKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT ICT ON M.OWKEY = ICT.OWKEY AND M.ICKEY = ICT.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_IC A ON ICT.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND ICT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND ICT.OWKEY = A.OWKEY WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND A.ICKEY IS NULL

/* wms-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIntfIcwcs */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INTF_ICWCS ( CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , IF_YN , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ ) SELECT TT.CTKEY , TT.OWKEY , TT.ICKEY , 'N' AS IF_YN , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ FROM ( SELECT CT.CTKEY , CT.OWKEY , CT.ICKEY , CASE WHEN A.ICKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT CT ON I.ICKEY = CT.ICKEY AND CT.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TWORK_SET_CTCS WCT ON CT.CTKEY = WCT.CTKEY AND CTCSKEY = 'AUTOWH_IF_YN' AND WCT.VALUE1 = 'YES' LEFT JOIN TWORK_INTF_ICWCS A ON CT.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND CT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND CT.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND A.IF_YN = 'N' WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'
